text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
255 
POST_OOPT_COINS_PCT 
LABEL: 
Post-Out-of-Pocket Threshold Coinsurance Percentage 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the co-insurance percentage that drugs on the tier are subject to during the 
post out-of-pocket threshold (catastrophic) phase of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: POST_OOPT_COINS_PCT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
—
